projectDescription: Pedal is a car rental web application that lets users browse vehicles by brand, select pickup/drop-off locations, and make reservations across multiple cities in Peru.
keyFeatures: Vehicle catalog filterable by brand (Honda, Chevrolet, Volvo, Mitsubishi, Volkswagen)
Booking form with car type, date, pickup time, pickup location, return time, and return location
Interactive map showing service coverage across Peru (Lima, Ica, Arequipa, Ancash, Piura)
24/7 customer support and multiple strategic pickup/drop-off locations
Newsletter subscription for promotions and updates
Loading screen animation and responsive single-page design
publicApiSurface: GET #home — Hero section with booking form
GET #topCars — Filterable vehicle catalog by brand
GET #service — Service features and value propositions
Brand filter: Honda, Chevrolet, Volvo, Mitsubishi, Volkswagen
Car types: Compacto, Sedán, SUV, Camioneta
Pickup/return locations: Miraflores, San Isidro, San Miguel
